strengths: Clear identification of three specific real-world objects with concrete contextual details
Well-developed and explicit links between each object and the chosen IA prompt
Strong use of relevant theories (Habermas, LÃ©vi-Strauss, Foucault, Laszlo) to support arguments
Most points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references
Coherent structure with clear section headers and smooth transitions
weaknesses: Occasional repetition and moments of imprecise wording across commentaries
Uneven depth of analysis between the three objects
Some theoretical connections (e.g., Foucaultâs strategic closure) lack concrete examples
Minor referencing and formatting inconsistencies in citations
A few suggestions and questions remain unaddressed (e.g., contrasting translation examples)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exhibition meets the high standard of the 9â10 band by clearly identifying three specific objects, situating each in a precise real-world context, and making strong, well-supported links to the IA prompt on community-bounded knowledge. The student integrates multiple theorists to deepen analysis and provides citations for almost every key point. The structure is coherent, with effective section headers and logical progression. Minor flawsâoccasional repetitiveness, slight imprecision in wording, uneven analytical depth, and small referencing inconsistenciesâprevent a perfect score but nonetheless justify a band-9 award. Given the official examinerâs overall mark of 9, this criterion is awarded 9 to reflect the high quality of the work while acknowledging the small areas for improvement.

annotations.comment: The student clearly labels the first object as âAlfajores Mar de Plata,â providing a concise heading that orients the reader immediately to the exhibitionâs focus.
The cultural background of the alfajor is vividly described, situating it within family traditions in Ecuadorâthis concrete context strengthens the link to community-based knowledge transmission.
The integration of Habermasâ communicative action theory is well executed, linking sociocultural criteria to the adaptation of culinary knowledgeâthis theoretical underpinning adds depth.

Consider clarifying how Habermasâ notion of communicative action specifically shapes the familyâs reinterpretation of the recipe. Tie the abstract theory more directly to the generational process.
The concluding statement on page 2 becomes overly general. Suggest refining to reflect nuanceâperhaps concede some culinary techniques do remain localized under specific conditions.
The hybrid identity argument on page 2 effectively demonstrates how global and local influences merge, illustrating the dynamic nature of knowledge across communities.
The declaration that no knowledge is ever exclusive to a single community is overstated. Could the student acknowledge contexts in which access remains restricted or contested?
The description of the âautentic applicationâ of the alfajor is persuasive, but could be strengthened by contrasting with an example of appropriation that loses its communal meaning.
The section header for the Huangdi Neijing is clear, immediately signalling a shift to the second object and maintaining coherence across the exhibition.
The historical context of the Huangdi Neijing as a third-century BCE medical treatise is well presented, giving depth to its community-specific significance.

The reference to indigenous taxonomies is promising but would benefit from explicitly linking each category (Zang-Fu, Jing-Luo, Bing-Ji) back to the central prompt on communal possession of knowledge.
Consider weaving LÃ©vi-Straussâs structuralist theory more tightly into the promptâs question: how do these symbolic schemes serve as barriers or conduits for cross-cultural transmission?
The discussion of the Neijingâs symbolic classification shows the studentâs grasp of how communal frameworks shape knowledge. The point is clearly argued and well supported.
The connection between Unschuldâs findings and the prompt could be sharpened by specifying how Yin-Yang labels hinder or help non-Chinese practitionersâ understanding.
The conclusion that some knowledge remains âinherently belongingâ to a community is persuasive and directly addresses the promptâs core. This paragraph demonstrates strong synthesis.
Might the student enrich this section by contrasting with an example of successful translation of Neijing concepts outside China? That contrast would nuance the claim of exclusivity.
The title âPelÃ­cula âEl CÃ³digo Enigmaââ precisely identifies the third object and transitions smoothly into the final case study.
The summary of Turingâs team work contextualizes the film historically, demonstrating how cryptographic expertise embodied communal, interdisciplinary knowledge.
The argument for interdisciplinarity is valid but could tie more directly to the prompt by explaining why cryptographic knowledge was restricted to certain epistemic communities.
Reference to Laszlo is interesting but reads as a broad invocation. Recommend critiquing how his connectivity theory specifically explains the filmâs depiction of guarded wartime knowledge.
The breakdown of each disciplineâs contribution in the Bombe project is detailed and illustrates how knowledge communities cooperated to surmount complex problems.
Foucaultâs concept of strategic closure is introduced but would benefit from an example (e.g., nuclear secrets) to illustrate how communities actively restrict knowledge.
The final paragraph contains a typographical error (âexista conocimiento especializadoâ) and ends abruptly. Proofread to improve flow and clarify the concluding insight.
Could the student integrate a brief case where wartime cryptography was later declassified? This would nuance how exclusive knowledge may eventually become shared.
The photograph citation lacks a publication date, which is essential for proper referencing. Add ân.d.â or the year of access to complete the entry.
The references exhibit varied formatting styles. Standardize to a single style (e.g., APA or Chicago) to enhance professionalism and consistency.
Verify that the Habermas PDF link remains accessible and consider adding an access date. This will strengthen the credibility of the source.
The LÃ©vi-Strauss entry omits publisher details and year of publication. Complete these elements to conform to academic referencing norms.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
